title: Oversee vineyard practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Oversee vineyard practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define the requirements of the vineyard

pcs.text: Identify range of grape varieties and cultivars, and vineyard growing systems according to requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify range of grape varieties and cultivars, and vineyard growing systems according to requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify range of grape varieties and cultivars, and vineyard growing systems according to requirements.

pcs.text: Determine materials, equipment and labour required for maintaining the vineyard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine materials, equipment and labour required for maintaining the vineyard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine materials, equipment and labour required for maintaining the vineyard.

pcs.text: Determine consumables required for maintaining the vineyard
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine consumables required for maintaining the vineyard?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine consumables required for maintaining the vineyard.

pcs.text: Check staff skills and knowledge of vineyard practices according to requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check staff skills and knowledge of vineyard practices according to requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check staff skills and knowledge of vineyard practices according to requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Define the requirements of the vineyard

elements.title: Develop a program of vineyard practices

pcs.text: Determine vineyard practices from planting out to harvest and for the annual growing season
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine vineyard practices from planting out to harvest and for the annual growing season?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine vineyard practices from planting out to harvest and for the annual growing season.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks in the workplace, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Consider the environmental implications of the vineyard program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider the environmental implications of the vineyard program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider the environmental implications of the vineyard program.

pcs.text: Identify and allocate resources required to meet vineyard program requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and allocate resources required to meet vineyard program requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and allocate resources required to meet vineyard program requirements.

pcs.text: Make allowance in the program for unforeseen circumstances, damage caused by weather and new developments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make allowance in the program for unforeseen circumstances, damage caused by weather and new developments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make allowance in the program for unforeseen circumstances, damage caused by weather and new developments.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the vineyard growing program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the vineyard growing program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop a program of vineyard practices

elements.title: Implement the program

pcs.text: Communicate the vineyard growing program and activities to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate the vineyard growing program and activities to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the vineyard growing program and activities to staff.

pcs.text: Maintain daily workplace records and other information relevant to the vineyard growing program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain daily workplace records and other information relevant to the vineyard growing program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain daily workplace records and other information relevant to the vineyard growing program.

pcs.text: Monitor work to ensure materials and equipment are used according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor work to ensure materials and equipment are used according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor work to ensure materials and equipment are used according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement the program

elements.title: Monitor and review the program

pcs.text: Compare vineyard growing program against previous programs, and make adjustments as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare vineyard growing program against previous programs, and make adjustments as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare vineyard growing program against previous programs, and make adjustments as necessary.

pcs.text: Review production plans to determine and align schedule of activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review production plans to determine and align schedule of activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review production plans to determine and align schedule of activities.

pcs.text: Compare vineyard growing program estimates against resource allocation costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare vineyard growing program estimates against resource allocation costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare vineyard growing program estimates against resource allocation costs.

pcs.text: Review vineyard practices and growing program to identify opportunities for improvements in performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review vineyard practices and growing program to identify opportunities for improvements in performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review vineyard practices and growing program to identify opportunities for improvements in performance.
